programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A caving trip goes wrong, trapping a group of women. Stalked by bloodthirsty beasts and turning against each other, they must become as savage as the creatures hunting them.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: A dazed and bloodied woman emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, but she must return to help find her missing friends and face the terror lurking there.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: From the producers of Shaun of the Dead and Hot Fuzz, Attack the Block follows a gang of tough inner-city kids who try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his life.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.desc: God Save the King' is broadcast each morning at 0559 on GB News - Britain's News Channel.

programme.title: Breakfast with Stephen and Ellie
programme.desc: Join Stephen Dixon and Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

programme.title: Britain's Newsroom
programme.desc: Miriam and Alex present every Friday morning. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Dawn Neesom bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Lee Anderson's Real World
programme.desc: Lee Anderson brings the Real World to the Great British public, as the silent majority finally have their voices heard.

programme.title: Friday Night with Matt Goodwin
programme.desc: Britain was once the envy of the world. Join Matt Goodwin as he explores how we fix the problems facing the country.

programme.title: Breakfast with Stephen and Anne
programme.desc: It's Stephen and Anne here. Join us for the weekend breakfast show Britain is turning to. News from around our great country and the world is live here on GB News Breakfast.

programme.title: Saturday Morning Live
programme.desc: Join GB News for a fun and friendly look at the news with debates on the topics that really matter to you.

programme.title: The Weekend
programme.desc: A lively look at all the latest live and breaking news for the weekend from around the UK with our network of GB News reporters, plus views and debate from a wide range of perspectives.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Sherman Klump's getting married but his alter-ego, Buddy Love, is a problem. He steals Sherman's fountain of youth formula and tangles with the whole Klump family.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: Hollywood's hottest star turns down a hack producer for his new movie, so he is lured into a series of bizarre scenes that secretly film his every move.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: J.P., a womanising nightclub owner, buys a bizarre, abstract pillar at a mysterious art gallery. Unknowingly, he's purchased the gateway to hell.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars is content with his artificial girlfriend: a life-sized doll named Bianca. When he develops feelings for an attractive co-worker, Lars finds himself lost in a unique love triangle.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book, she's reunited with her mother. Consumed by dark memories of the house, she ends up unearthing a horrifying reality.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Eyes Without a Face
programme.desc: A surgeon causes a car accident which leaves his daughter disfigured and goes to extreme lengths to give her a new face.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands petty criminal Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
programme.desc: Act three in the horror series based on a Stephen King story. Two brothers are adopted by a family. Deadly occurrences follow, amid revelations that one boy was in a bizarre cult in Nebraska.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: The story of a teenager who struggles through school and family life by escaping into a fantasy world of magic and monsters.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Demonic Toys: Personal Demons
programme.desc: A group of people on a world wide search for oddities find themselves trapped in a nine hundred year old Italian castle when they accidently unleash the Demonic Toys.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: The imprisoned Dr West continues his gruesome experiments with the aid of the new jailhouse physician.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Paramedics on Scene
programme.desc: In the Scottish Highlands, the air ambulance is scrambled to an emergency involving a deer manager who has been crushed by his own quad bike and needs to be airlifted to hospital fast.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A new season brings 6 new faces to the lifeguard service. Head lifeguard, Hoppo, shows them how to perform a mass-rescue single handedly.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A former New York family court judge, Judge Judy acts as a true moral compass for people seeking guidance, resolution and a little common sense.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian's attempt to rescue Roger from his Mohawk captors goes awry when a ghost from Claire's past lays waste to their plan. Brianna worries Claire, Jamie and Roger might not return.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Following celebrations in honour of Brianna and Roger's wedding, Governor Tryon reminds Jamie of his obligation to hunt down and kill Murtagh Fitzgibbons.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger leads Jamie's militia to the trading post of Brownsville and finds himself in a feud. Jamie and Claire arrive to find that Roger's unusual strategy may have cost them the loyalty of the militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and his militia arrive at Hillsborough to learn that Governor Tryon has proposed a rather unorthodox solution to deal with the threat posed by the Regulators and to resolve the political crisis.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Jocasta's wedding, Jamie learns Tryon's true motivation for ending the Regulator threat.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Regulator Rebellion reaches a boiling point, forcing Jamie to face his fear and confront the consequence of his divided loyalties.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Frasers must come to terms with all that has changed in the aftermath of the Battle of Alamance Creek. Brianna tries to help Roger overcome the trauma he has endured.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: When Jamie is bitten by a venomous snake, Claire fears she may not have the resources to save him. Jamie asks Roger to complete an important task in the event of his death.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Roger implement their plan to eliminate the threat looming over them, but it goes awry. Brianna is forced to confront her greatest fear and fight for her and her son's lives.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A revelation about Jemmy forces Roger and Brianna to choose between staying in the 18th century, or returning to the safety of the future.

programme.desc: Claire struggles to survive brutal treatment from her captors, as Jamie gathers a group of loyal men to help him rescue his wife. Roger and Brianna's journey takes a surprising turn.

programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.desc: Week three and it's bread week. The remaining bakers have a lot to prove with three tough challenges, set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand teams up with Jonathan Ross, Ravneet Gill, and Josh Pugh, to celebrate Bread Week, highlighting joyful bakes and supporting those in need.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Alison Hammond and Noel Fielding host as the bakers take on the challenges of caramel week. In the signature challenge the contestants craft some biscuits before taking on a caramel technical.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand dives into Caramel Week with Prue Leith and superfans Oti Mabuse and Chloe Petts, critiqued by Tom Allen, while showcasing viewer baking photos.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers compete in pastry challenges: frangipane tart Signature, flaky Technical, and choux Paris-Brest Showstopper requiring freestanding podium.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand hosts Alexander Armstrong, Natalie Cassidy, and AJ Odudu for Pastry Week discussions. Tom Allen reviews audience bakes and Jo highlights viewer photos.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers in the tent face three Autumn themed challenges, the signature is an Autumnal Pie, the technical is a Vegan Parkin, and the showstopper an Autumnal Festival Cake.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by Carol Vorderman, Iain Stirling, and Leomie Anderson to explore Autumn Week. Tom Allen reviews audience creations, and Jo checks out viewer photos.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers face three Dessert challenges, the signature is eight Meringue Nests with two fillings, the technical is a Spotted Dick, and the showstopper is a Tiramisu.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo's joined by Jack Dee, Amy Gledhill and Eddie Kadi to dip into Dessert Week. Whose meringue nests peaked? And who got their just desserts?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The five quarter-finalists face three 1970's challenges, the signature is a Profiterole Stack, the technical is a Banoffee Pie, and the showstopper is an intricately decorated layered 1970's Gateau.

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo's joined by Paul Hollywood, Ellie Taylor and Layton Williams to boogie through 1970s week. Whose profiterole tower made them baker of the hour?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the bakers show off their patisserie prowess with breakfast pastries and a classic-but-theatrical Technical. Who'll make final-worthy fruit entremets?

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo's joined by Lorraine Kelly, Phil Wang and Vogue Williams to devour all the Patisserie Week semi-final action. Whose buttery breakfast pastries melted the judges' hearts?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The finalists go all out with Signature scones, afternoon tea and tiered celebration cakes. Whose chance of winning has come and scone? And who'll be shedding tiers of joy?

programme.title: Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo's joined by Prue Leith and Harry Hill to spill the tea on the final. There's interviews with our three finalists, and Tom catches up with all dozen bakers.
